name: player yards created and blocked + team yards blocked
description: Test case for player yards created and blocked + team yards blocked
expected_query: with "td3e58c9af2784a38918c4ab350c00288" as materialized (select COALESCE(bc_pid, trg_pid) as pid, SUM(yards_created) as yards_created_from_plays from "nfl_plays" where not "play_type" = 'NOPL' and "nfl_plays"."nfl_week_id" in ('2024_PRE_WEEK_1', '2024_PRE_WEEK_2', '2024_PRE_WEEK_3', '2024_PRE_WEEK_4', '2024_REG_WEEK_1', '2024_REG_WEEK_2', '2024_REG_WEEK_3', '2024_REG_WEEK_4', '2024_REG_WEEK_5', '2024_REG_WEEK_6', '2024_REG_WEEK_7', '2024_REG_WEEK_8', '2024_REG_WEEK_9', '2024_REG_WEEK_10', '2024_REG_WEEK_11', '2024_REG_WEEK_12', '2024_REG_WEEK_13', '2024_REG_WEEK_14', '2024_REG_WEEK_15', '2024_REG_WEEK_16', '2024_REG_WEEK_17', '2024_REG_WEEK_18', '2024_REG_WEEK_19', '2024_REG_WEEK_20', '2024_REG_WEEK_21', '2024_POST_WEEK_1', '2024_POST_WEEK_2', '2024_POST_WEEK_3', '2024_POST_WEEK_4') and "nfl_plays"."year" in (2024) group by COALESCE(bc_pid, trg_pid)), "t0c5e60186e061ea413a1099303dd3a2e" as materialized (select COALESCE(bc_pid) as pid, SUM(yards_blocked) as yards_blocked_from_plays from "nfl_plays" where not "play_type" = 'NOPL' and "nfl_plays"."nfl_week_id" in ('2024_PRE_WEEK_1', '2024_PRE_WEEK_2', '2024_PRE_WEEK_3', '2024_PRE_WEEK_4', '2024_REG_WEEK_1', '2024_REG_WEEK_2', '2024_REG_WEEK_3', '2024_REG_WEEK_4', '2024_REG_WEEK_5', '2024_REG_WEEK_6', '2024_REG_WEEK_7', '2024_REG_WEEK_8', '2024_REG_WEEK_9', '2024_REG_WEEK_10', '2024_REG_WEEK_11', '2024_REG_WEEK_12', '2024_REG_WEEK_13', '2024_REG_WEEK_14', '2024_REG_WEEK_15', '2024_REG_WEEK_16', '2024_REG_WEEK_17', '2024_REG_WEEK_18', '2024_REG_WEEK_19', '2024_REG_WEEK_20', '2024_REG_WEEK_21', '2024_POST_WEEK_1', '2024_POST_WEEK_2', '2024_POST_WEEK_3', '2024_POST_WEEK_4') and "nfl_plays"."year" in (2024) group by COALESCE(bc_pid)), "t5a2b2569de6127331d06ab399f9f3dd7" as materialized (select "nfl_plays"."off" as "nfl_team", SUM(yards_blocked) AS team_yards_blocked_from_plays from "nfl_plays" where not "play_type" = 'NOPL' and "nfl_plays"."nfl_week_id" in ('2024_PRE_WEEK_1', '2024_PRE_WEEK_2', '2024_PRE_WEEK_3', '2024_PRE_WEEK_4', '2024_REG_WEEK_1', '2024_REG_WEEK_2', '2024_REG_WEEK_3', '2024_REG_WEEK_4', '2024_REG_WEEK_5', '2024_REG_WEEK_6', '2024_REG_WEEK_7', '2024_REG_WEEK_8', '2024_REG_WEEK_9', '2024_REG_WEEK_10', '2024_REG_WEEK_11', '2024_REG_WEEK_12', '2024_REG_WEEK_13', '2024_REG_WEEK_14', '2024_REG_WEEK_15', '2024_REG_WEEK_16', '2024_REG_WEEK_17', '2024_REG_WEEK_18', '2024_REG_WEEK_19', '2024_REG_WEEK_20', '2024_REG_WEEK_21', '2024_POST_WEEK_1', '2024_POST_WEEK_2', '2024_POST_WEEK_3', '2024_POST_WEEK_4') and "nfl_plays"."year" in (2024) group by "nfl_plays"."off"), "t5a2b2569de6127331d06ab399f9f3dd7_team_stats" as materialized (select "t5a2b2569de6127331d06ab399f9f3dd7"."nfl_team", sum(t5a2b2569de6127331d06ab399f9f3dd7.team_yards_blocked_from_plays) as team_yards_blocked_from_plays from "t5a2b2569de6127331d06ab399f9f3dd7" group by "t5a2b2569de6127331d06ab399f9f3dd7"."nfl_team"), "player_year_teams" as materialized (select "pid", "year", (array_agg(tm ORDER BY game_count DESC, tm ASC))[1] as team from (select "player_gamelogs"."pid", "nfl_games"."year", "player_gamelogs"."tm", count(*) as "game_count" from "player_gamelogs" inner join "nfl_games" on "nfl_games"."esbid" = "player_gamelogs"."esbid" where "nfl_games"."seas_type" = 'REG' and "nfl_games"."year" in (2024) and "player_gamelogs"."year" in (2024) group by "player_gamelogs"."pid", "nfl_games"."year", "player_gamelogs"."tm") as "player_year_team_counts" group by "pid", "year") select "player"."pid", "td3e58c9af2784a38918c4ab350c00288"."yards_created_from_plays" AS "yards_created_from_plays_0", "t0c5e60186e061ea413a1099303dd3a2e"."yards_blocked_from_plays" AS "yards_blocked_from_plays_0", "t5a2b2569de6127331d06ab399f9f3dd7_team_stats"."team_yards_blocked_from_plays" AS "team_yards_blocked_from_plays_0", "player"."pos" from "player" left join "td3e58c9af2784a38918c4ab350c00288" on "td3e58c9af2784a38918c4ab350c00288"."pid" = "player"."pid" left join "t0c5e60186e061ea413a1099303dd3a2e" on "t0c5e60186e061ea413a1099303dd3a2e"."pid" = "player"."pid" left join "player_year_teams" on "player_year_teams"."pid" = "player"."pid" and "player_year_teams"."year" = 2024 left join "t5a2b2569de6127331d06ab399f9f3dd7_team_stats" on "t5a2b2569de6127331d06ab399f9f3dd7_team_stats"."nfl_team" = "player_year_teams"."team" group by "td3e58c9af2784a38918c4ab350c00288"."yards_created_from_plays", "t0c5e60186e061ea413a1099303dd3a2e"."yards_blocked_from_plays", "t5a2b2569de6127331d06ab399f9f3dd7_team_stats"."team_yards_blocked_from_plays", "player"."pid", "player"."lname", "player"."fname", "player"."pos" order by 2 DESC NULLS LAST, "player"."pid" asc limit 500
